title: RH-EML: Unification & Full Proof Attempt

ingredients.object: All RH-EML ingredients collected from S316-S331

I1.name: Shadow Independence
I1.content: shadow(ζ)=3: provable from Euler product WITHOUT assuming RH

I2.name: Essential Oscillation
I2.content: ζ irreducibly EML-3 on critical line: oscillation cannot be removed

I3.name: Euler Product Criterion
I3.content: RH ↔ Euler product ↔ EML-3; confirmed by Epstein/Hurwitz counter-examples

I4.name: Critical Line Fixed Point
I4.content: Re=1/2 = unique EML-3 fixed line of s↦1-s

I5.name: Selberg/Deligne Proof-of-Concept
I5.content: EML-3 argument works in proven cases (Selberg, function field)

I6.name: Depth Barrier
I6.content: Off-line zeros → ET=∞ via tropical semiring

proof_attempt.object: Best current RH-EML proof attempt: unification of all ingredients

proof.statement: All non-trivial zeros of ζ(s) lie on Re(s)=1/2

step1.meaning: ζ has essential complex oscillatory character

step2.action: From I2 (Essential Oscillation): ζ irreducibly EML-3 on critical line

step3.action: Assume H: ET invariant is constant (=3) on connected critical strip
step3.status: KEY HYPOTHESIS: requires proving 'EML-3 regions are open and connected'

step4.action: From H + I6 (Depth Barrier): off-line point would have ET=∞ ≠ 3

step5.action: Therefore: no off-line zeros; all zeros on Re=1/2

key_hypothesis_H.statement: ET invariant of ζ is constant = 3 on the critical strip
key_hypothesis_H.equivalent_to: The EML-3 region is connected and contains the critical strip
key_hypothesis_H.evidence: I5 (proven for Selberg + function field); I3 (Euler product criterion)

gap.object: Precise gap analysis: what is missing for a complete proof?

gap.name: ET Constancy Lemma (ECL)
gap.statement: For ζ(s) analytic on the critical strip: ET(ζ(s)) is constant on connected components
gap.why_hard: ET is not a standard analytic invariant; continuity of ET not obvious

A1.approach: Prove via Taylor expansion: ET at s = ET at s₀ + perturbation

A2.approach: Use Selberg+Deligne as bootstrap: ECL proven in those cases, extend

A3.approach: Langlands (S328): automorphic unitarity → zeros on Re=1/2 DIRECTLY
A3.status: Most promising; bypasses ECL; requires Langlands for GL(1) over Q

gap.frontier: A3 (Langlands) appears to bypass ECL entirely: prove RH via spectral unitarity

formulations.EML_RH: All non-trivial zeros of ζ(s) are EML-3 (shadow=3)
equivalent_forms: ET invariant of ζ is constant = 3 on critical strip
ζ has no cross-type (EML-∞) points in critical strip
The Euler product structure dominates throughout the critical strip
proven_consequences: GUE statistics for zeros (S320): required by shadow=3 + Shadow Depth Theorem
Prime error term O(x^{1/2+ε}) (S318): required by EML-3 zero sum
Functional equation depth symmetry (S319): EML-3 = EML-3 about Re=1/2
formulations.status: EML formulation = cleanest path to RH via shadow/depth theory

verdicts.best_proof: 5-step conditional proof; key hypothesis = ET Constancy Lemma (ECL)
verdicts.gap: ECL: ET constant on connected domain (analyticity forces ET-constancy)
verdicts.best_path: Langlands approach (A3): bypasses ECL via spectral unitarity
verdicts.unified_form: EML-RH: all zeros EML-3 ↔ shadow(ζ)=3 ↔ no cross-type in strip
verdicts.new_result: Unified EML formulation: 4 equivalent forms of RH + 3 proven consequences

key_theorem: RH-EML Unification (S332): Unified EML formulation of RH — four equivalent forms: (1) All zeros EML-3; (2) shadow(ζ)=3 throughout strip; (3) No cross-type (EML-∞) in critical strip; (4) Euler product dominates. Best proof attempt: 5 steps, conditional on ET Constancy Lemma (ECL). Three proven consequences of EML-RH: GUE statistics, prime error O(x^{1/2+ε}), FE symmetry. Best path forward: Langlands approach BYPASSES ECL via spectral unitarity. Two key ingredients proven (Shadow Independence + Essential Oscillation). Three proof-of-concepts (Selberg, Deligne, GUE). One gap remains (ECL).
rabbit_hole_log: Best proof: 5 steps conditional on ECL (ET Constancy Lemma)
Langlands (A3): most promising path; bypasses ECL
